summary: This is an extremely brief post where Joel Spolsky recommends a taskbar utility created by David Bau, a former Internet Explorer developer. The tool combines search, address bar, and calculator functionality into a single taskbar widget. The post is essentially a link recommendation with minimal commentary, offering just a one-sentence description and download link.
key_points: Joel highlights a multi-purpose taskbar utility that combines search, address bar, and calculator functions
The tool was built by David Bau, whose credibility is established by his background on the Internet Explorer team
The post exemplifies early 2000s blogging style: short link-sharing posts with brief personal endorsement
money_quotes: David Bau, a veteran of the Internet Explorer development team, wrote an incredibly cool search utility/address bar/calculator for your taskbar.
key_insight: A brief link recommendation post highlighting a developer tool, representative of early blogging as a link-sharing medium.
